summary: Completed frontend-only testing of Devanshi's PMM portfolio (single-page React site). Tested page load, sticky/glass nav, smooth-scroll anchor navigation, Hero with 3 verticals + 2 CTAs, Marquee, About badges + stats, 4 Selected Work case studies with Challenge/Insight/Strategy/Result blocks, Campaign Gallery mosaic, Contact (email/LinkedIn/CV), Footer, mobile responsive layout. All requested checks pass with 0 console errors and 0 page errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Site is a single-page editorial portfolio — code is clean, no console errors, no page errors. All data-testid attributes from /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/portfolio.js are correctly applied.
Only network failure observed is https://.../cdn-cgi/rum (Cloudflare RUM analytics) — harmless and external, no action needed.
Placeholder email (devanshi.pmm@gmail.com) and LinkedIn (linkedin.com/in/devanshi/) work as mailto/external links — user should swap with real values when available (as flagged by main agent).
Download CV button intentionally a placeholder alert — per main agent's note, expected behavior.

Hero name testid contains extra trailing text 'writes brands that sell.' because the hero-name wrapper includes the headline; this is intentional grouping but worth noting if name-only display is ever needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend single-page portfolio at https://pmm-portfolio-2.preview.emergentagent.com. All test IDs live in /app/frontend/src/constants/testIds/portfolio.js (PORTFOLIO.*). Nav links are hash-anchors (#about,#work,#gallery,#contact) with smooth scroll. Nav class switches to glassy 'bg-[#F5F2EB]/85 backdrop-blur-xl' after scrollY > 0. Verified mobile (390x844) and desktop (1920x1080).
